import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 16, 
    'description': 'v16 reactive: lower detector=0.1, strong pure-rotate |angle|>0.6 with -6.5*angle, OA only on detector<0.3+min_front<0.8 (left/right bias), stable follow if dist<2.5 (linear~0.32 human speed match +0.25*err, -6.5*ang), seek=0.9 if far, backup <0.8m, refined depth (valid>0.05, center patch). Manual safe count with exact success_angle. Targets better accumulation of facing time in range for >=500 safe steps.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v16 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v16 improves stabilization and facing persistence around 1.5m with speed matching and stronger angular control.')
